hero.section: relative py-20 px-4 bg-gradient-to-b from-[#f0f9ff] via-white to-transparent overflow-hidden
hero.blob1: absolute top-1/2 left-1/2 transform -translate-x-1/2 -translate-y-1/2 w-[600px] h-[600px] bg-gradient-to-bl from-[#0a91b1]/10 to-blue-500/10 rounded-full blur-3xl animate-blob animation-delay-4000
hero.blob2: absolute top-1/2 left-1/2 transform -translate-x-1/2 -translate-y-1/2 w-[500px] h-[500px] bg-gradient-to-tr from-sky-500/10 to-[#0a91b1]/10 rounded-full blur-3xl animate-blob
hero.subtitle: inline-block px-4 py-1.5 mb-4 text-sm font-medium rounded-full bg-[#0a91b1]/10 text-[#0a91b1] border border-[#0a91b1]/20
hero.title: text-4xl md:text-5xl font-bold text-gray-900 mb-6

contactOptions.card: group p-8 bg-white rounded-2xl shadow-lg hover:shadow-xl border border-gray-100 hover:border-[#0a91b1]/20 transition-all duration-300
contactOptions.iconContainer: w-14 h-14 mb-6 rounded-xl bg-[#0a91b1]/10 group-hover:bg-[#0a91b1]/20 flex items-center justify-center transition-colors
contactOptions.title: text-xl font-semibold mb-2 text-gray-900 group-hover:text-[#0a91b1]

contactForm.section: relative py-16 px-4 bg-gradient-to-b from-white via-[#0a91b1]/5 to-white
contactForm.formContainer: bg-white p-8 rounded-2xl shadow-lg border border-gray-100

formGroup.label: block text-sm font-medium text-gray-700 mb-1
formGroup.input: w-full px-4 py-2.5 bg-white border border-gray-200 rounded-lg focus:ring-2 focus:ring-[#0a91b1]/20 focus:border-[#0a91b1] transition-colors
formGroup.textarea: w-full px-4 py-2.5 bg-white border border-gray-200 rounded-lg focus:ring-2 focus:ring-[#0a91b1]/20 focus:border-[#0a91b1] transition-colors

contactForm.submitButton: w-full bg-[#0a91b1] text-white py-3 px-6 rounded-lg font-semibold hover:bg-[#097d99] transition-colors hover:shadow-lg hover:-translate-y-0.5 transition-all duration-300

mapInfo.hoursCard: bg-white p-8 rounded-2xl shadow-lg border border-gray-100
mapInfo.hoursIconContainer: w-10 h-10 rounded-lg bg-[#0a91b1]/10 flex items-center justify-center
mapInfo.emergencyIconContainer: w-10 h-10 rounded-lg bg-cyan-600/20 flex items-center justify-center

animations.blob: keyframes { 0% { transform: translate(-50%, -50%) scale(1) rotate(0deg); } 33% { transform: translate(-50%, -50%) scale(1.1) rotate(120deg); } 66% { transform: translate(-50%, -50%) scale(0.9) rotate(240deg); } 100% { transform: translate(-50%, -50%) scale(1) rotate(360deg); } }
